_comment: Cosys-AirSim settings.json — copy this to ~/Documents/AirSim/settings.json before launching UE5. Vehicle name 'Drone0' and sensor names match scenario 29.
_comment_simpleflight: Tier 3 uses SimpleFlight (AirSim's built-in FC) via AirSim RPC. PX4+Cosys HIL integration is broken upstream (PX4 #24033, AirSim #5018) — see ADR-011 amendment for #490. Companion stack drives SimpleFlight via CosysFCLink (MultirotorRpcLibClient). Battery / RC / datalink fault simulation remains in Gazebo Tier 2.

echo._comment: Issue #705 — Cosys-Lab Echo sensor (sensor type 7) — physical FMCW-style radar simulator with ray-cast beam pattern + multipath reflections + attenuation. Replaces the lidar-emulated CosysRadarBackend (#702 root cause: lidar treated as radar produces structured ground clutter). 20 Hz matches the existing radar tick; 1000 traces gives reasonable beam-pattern resolution; 50 m distance limit matches our radar max_range; FOV ±60°×±15° is forward-looking automotive style; mounted slightly forward + slightly above body origin.
